build_results: Both requested builds passed after installing sandbox prerequisites rust 1.92.0, protobuf-compiler, warp-channel-config, and X11 runtime libraries.
app_launch_method: Built target/debug/warp launched under Xvfb :97 with HOME=/workspace/warp-control-cli-verification/home, XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/workspace/warp-control-cli-verification/runtime, and WARP_LOCAL_CONTROL_DISCOVERY_DIR=/workspace/warp-control-cli-verification/runtime/local-control.

settings_states_verified.result: discovery record had outside_warp_control_enabled=false; Drive mutations returned local_control_disabled
endpoint was published; Drive mutations returned insufficient_permissions for mutate_underlying_data
authenticated user BaLlFiT7uiVZ21rvqorhMPwz1oE2 was available; disposable Drive create/update/share-to-team/insert/delete paths were verified and cleanup deletes succeeded

notable_findings: Create responses initially returned Client-* IDs. Follow-up commands using those client IDs returned stale_target after server sync; resolving the server-backed IDs with drive list allowed update/share/delete/insert to proceed.
drive.object.insert from an external xterm without an explicit Warp window failed with missing_target because no active Warp window was tracked; retrying with --window-id 0 succeeded.
The disposable prompt was updated, shared to team, and deleted successfully. Disposable notebooks used for insert tests were deleted successfully after verification.

commands.name: drive-list-notebook-for-disposable-resolution
commands.command: target/debug/warpctrl --output-format json drive list --type notebook
commands.expected_result: Documents follow-up behavior using create-returned client IDs before server ID resolution.
commands.actual_result: success listed 4564 objects

commands.name: drive-list-notebook-for-insert-second-resolution
commands.command: target/debug/warpctrl --output-format json drive list --type notebook
commands.expected_result: Metadata read used to resolve server-backed disposable object/window IDs for verification.
commands.actual_result: success listed 4564 objects

commands.name: drive-list-prompt-for-disposable-resolution
commands.command: target/debug/warpctrl --output-format json drive list --type prompt
commands.expected_result: Documents follow-up behavior using create-returned client IDs before server ID resolution.
commands.actual_result: success listed 82 objects

commands.name: drive-object-create-default-off
commands.command: target/debug/warpctrl --output-format json drive object create --type prompt --content warpctrl-disposable-verification
commands.expected_result: Denied before permission grant because outside-Warp control is disabled.
commands.actual_result: error local_control_disabled: outside-Warp local control credential broker is disabled for this instance

commands.name: drive-object-create-disposable-notebook
commands.command: target/debug/warpctrl --output-format json drive object create --type notebook --content-file /workspace/warp-control-cli-verification/notebook-create-content.json
commands.expected_result: Succeeds against disposable authenticated Drive object when permissions and target are valid, except where actual result documents a handler/target limitation.
commands.actual_result: success drive.object.create on notebook Client-028c32a2-12d3-499c-a0ec-234d5f9a82fd (warpctrl disposable verification notebook)
